creator: vovkasm@gmail.com
text:
Thanks!
My bad :-(

On Sat, Nov 6, 2010 at 15:18, Frederic Culot <culot@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Some problems were found by tinderbox:
>
> - DateTime::Format::{MySQL,SQLite,W3CDTF} prerequisites are missing,
> is it just test-related or should they be added?
Yes, they are only need for test code...
By the way... Should we add it to TEST_DEPENDS (as in devel/p5-Moose for ex)?

>
> - usr/local/man/man1/form_generator.pl.1 is still present after deinstall
Sorry, new patch attached (hope that gnats can accept attaches in followups)

>
> See: http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/7.3-FreeBSD/p5-HTML-FormHandler-Model-DBIC-0.14.log
>

Vladimir Timofeev <vovkasm@gmail.com>
